metadata.desc: An AstrBot platform adapter that polls XiaoHeiHe web messages and replies through the comment API.

status_page_enabled.hint: Expose a runtime status page in the plugin detail view.

show_sensitive_status.hint: Show heybox_id, device_id and Cookie for debugging. Disabled by default.

login_request_timeout.hint: Timeout in seconds for creating QR codes and polling QR login status.

login.title: QR Login
login.description: Scan with the XiaoHeiHe app and save the web login session.

status.title: Status
status.description: View XiaoHeiHe adapter polling, deduplication, send, and error status.
status.heading: XiaoHeiHe Adapter Status
status.empty: No XiaoHeiHe platform instance is running.
